site.name: Imam Dr. Ahmed Abouseif
site.title: Imam Dr. Ahmed Abouseif - Doctor of Tafsīr & Qur'anic Sciences
site.description: Official website of Imam Dr. Ahmed Abouseif, Doctor of Tafsīr and Qur'anic Sciences from Al-Azhar University, holder of connected Qur'anic ijazahs, and Founder and President of the American Imams Academy in Texas.

hero.name: Dr. Ahmed Abouseif
hero.description: Doctorate in Tafsīr and Qur'anic Sciences from Al-Azhar University, holding connected Qur'anic ijazahs (isnād) to the Prophet ﷺ. Former Director of the General Department of Religious Guidance at the Egyptian Ministry of Awqāf. Over three decades of experience in imamate, university teaching, scholarly research, and family counseling across Egypt and the United States.

mission.title: A Qur'anic, Educational, Civilizational Project
mission.body: A purpose-driven (maqāṣidī) reading of the Qur'an that connects revelation to the human being and to lived reality — carrying the verse from the text into life: in building the individual, the renaissance of the ummah, and the jurisprudence of the contemporary Muslim in the West. Not passing exhortation, but an insight by which life itself is read.
mission.pillar_1_desc: A structural, purpose-driven reading that draws out the laws of revelation.
mission.pillar_2_desc: Carrying meaning from the text to the heart and to conduct.
mission.pillar_3_desc: The jurisprudence of nations' rise and the Muslim's place in the West.

projects.title: A School of Thought, Not an Archive
projects.subtitle: The writings unfold across integrated paths that complete one another — choose your path and begin the journey.

desc.prophetic-light: Glimmers from the Prophetic guidance on the jurisprudence of reform, steadfastness, and perseverance along the path of daʿwah.
desc.civilization: A structural reading of the laws governing the rise and fall of nations as the Qur'an presents them, and the Muslim's jurisprudence in engaging his reality.
desc.wisdom-insights: Qur'anic, educational reflections that carry the verse to the heart and to the human journey toward God.
desc.imamship: Crafting the contemporary imam in the West — in knowledge, management, and pastoral care — and the issues of the daʿwah household.
desc.family: The jurisprudence of the Muslim family and raising children between Prophetic guidance and the reality of the West.
desc.fiqh: Questions of contemporary jurisprudence and thought through a purpose-driven method.

latest_videos.title: Latest Lectures

cta.title: Join the Imams Academy
cta.description: Specialized training programs in Islamic sciences and du'ah leadership for imams and seekers of knowledge.

about.title: Biography
about.subtitle: Scholarly and Da'wah Journey
about.intro: Imam Dr. Ahmed Abouseif holds a Ph.D. in Tafsīr and Qur'anic Sciences from Al-Azhar University (2008), along with a Qur'anic ijazah in the recitation of Hafs through the Shāṭibiyyah and Ṭayyibah transmissions, with a connected isnād to the Prophet ﷺ. He is the Founder and President of the American Imams Academy in Plano, Texas (since March 2017), and serves as Imam and Director of Religious Affairs at the Academy's Mosque (since November 2021). His career spans more than three decades across imamate, university teaching, scholarly research, institutional leadership, and media engagement in both Egypt and the United States.

fatwa.title: Islamic Q&A (Fatwa)
fatwa.subtitle: Send your Islamic question and it will reach the Imam directly. Answers follow established Shariah guidelines.
fatwa.name: Name
fatwa.question: Your question
fatwa.disclaimer: Note: Answers are general scholarly opinions based on the information provided and do not replace direct consultation for complex or private matters. Selected questions and answers may later be published in the archive without your personal data.
fatwa.consent: I agree to the general handling of my question and publishing its answer in the archive without my personal data.
fatwa.success: Your question was sent successfully and reached the Imam. May Allah reward you.
fatwa.error: Sending failed. Please try again or use the contact page.

maqasid.title: Objective-Based Tafsīr
maqasid.subtitle: A series on reading the Qur'an in light of its higher objectives — from clarifying the concept to practical application in conduct, society, and the self.
